title: Fresh Cheese And Cream.
content:
Would ye have fresh cheese and cream?
    Julia's breast can give you them:
    And, if more, each nipple cries:
    To your cream here's strawberries.
meaning:
"Fresh Cheese And Cream." is a quintessential example of Robert Herrick's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
